markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.058 — Inspection of Records

A motor vehicle title service license holder or any of its employees shall allow an inspection of records required under Section 520.057 (Records) by a peace officer on the premises of the motor vehicle title service at any reasonable time to verify, check, or audit the records.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 1478, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: A motor vehicle title service license holder or any of its employees shall allow an inspection of records required under Section 520.057 (Records) by a peace officer on the premises of the motor vehicle title service at any reasonable time to verify, check, or audit the records.
